claims.claim_text: Word2Vec popularized word-vector compositional arithmetic and analogy behavior.
claims.rationale: The Mikolov compositionality paper is the primary historical source for the famous analogy-style behavior associated with Word2Vec embeddings.

claims.claim_text: Modern semantic retrieval commonly uses sentence or passage embeddings rather than isolated word embeddings.
claims.rationale: Sentence-BERT is a strong topical anchor for sentence-level semantic search, but it does not by itself prove the broad industry-wide word 'usually'.

further_reading.title: Sentence-BERT: Sentence Embeddings using Siamese BERT-Networks
further_reading.why_relevant: Foundational paper for practical sentence embeddings and semantic search.

further_reading.title: MTEB: Massive Text Embedding Benchmark
further_reading.why_relevant: Useful follow-on reading for evaluating embedding models with retrieval-oriented benchmarks.

notes: Most of the module is pedagogical explanation or hypothetical examples, so it does not require dense inline citation under the rubric. No real-world incidents or vendor pricing snapshots in the body required incident/pricing handling.
